name: openagentgraph
description: Event-sourced execution graphs, code maps, handoffs, and coordination surfaces for supervised autonomous software work.

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build --workspace=packages/electron && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/electron"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run build --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.electron:start: npm run electron:build && npm run start --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.vscode:build: npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run build --workspace=packages/vscode-extension
scripts.vscode:package: npm run vscode:build && npm run package --workspace=packages/vscode-extension
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run start:backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend && npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.gate:check: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/gate.js
scripts.handoff:print: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/handoff.js
scripts.handoff:write: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/handoff.js --output GRAPH_REPORT.md
scripts.dogfood: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/dogfood.js
scripts.verify:graph: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build:roslyn-helper:optional --workspace=packages/backend --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/verifyGraph.js
scripts.graph:query: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphQuery.js
scripts.graph:path: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphPath.js
scripts.graph:explain: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphExplain.js
scripts.graph:export: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphExport.js
scripts.graph:lens: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphLens.js
scripts.graph:check: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphCheck.js
scripts.graph:update: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphUpdate.js
scripts.graph:benchmark:update: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphBenchmarkUpdate.js
scripts.graph:benchmark:external: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphBenchmarkExternal.js
scripts.graph:context: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphContext.js
scripts.graph:retrieve: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphRetrieve.js
scripts.graph:scorecard: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphScorecard.js
scripts.graph:learn: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/graphLearn.js
scripts.oag:wrap: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/oagWrap.js
scripts.oag:mcp: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/mcp/server.js
scripts.graph:smoke:workspace: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/scripts/graph-npm-smoke.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false -p packages/frontend/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false -p packages/electron/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false -p packages/vscode-extension/tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run gate:check -- --mode hard --allow-empty
scripts.verify:e2e: npx playwright test tests/e2e/runtime-flows.spec.ts -g "opens the intent graph"
scripts.verify:ci: npm run verify && npm run verify:graph && npm run verify:e2e
